query:
UPDATE lectures 
SET videoUrl = 'https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=4i5WvOTzCH4',
    description = 'In this session, Dr. Abdullah M. Al Alawi — Senior Consultant and Program Director of Internal Medicine at Sultan Qaboos University Hospital — delivers a comprehensive guide on writing and publishing a medical case report. The lecture covers what makes a case publishable, mastering the CARE guidelines structure, ethics and patient consent, authorship, choosing the right journal, handling peer review, and evolving a case report into a case series. Includes real-world case showcases and practical tips for avoiding common mistakes.',
    sessionDate = '2026-02-25 22:00:00'
WHERE title LIKE '%Case Report%' AND title LIKE '%How to Write%';
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3gJPMgbNvxobdJv.c80c7479a201 --database kEGM3BVtTzTes7GE5TMbVx --execute UPDATE lectures 
SET videoUrl = 'https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=4i5WvOTzCH4',
    description = 'In this session, Dr. Abdullah M. Al Alawi — Senior Consultant and Program Director of Internal Medicine at Sultan Qaboos University Hospital — delivers a comprehensive guide on writing and publishing a medical case report. The lecture covers what makes a case publishable, mastering the CARE guidelines structure, ethics and patient consent, authorship, choosing the right journal, handling peer review, and evolving a case report into a case series. Includes real-world case showcases and practical tips for avoiding common mistakes.',
    sessionDate = '2026-02-25 22:00:00'
WHERE title LIKE '%Case Report%' AND title LIKE '%How to Write%';
